chapter_title.en: The Reward for the Ziyārah of the Graves of Abil Ĥasan Mūsā ibn Ja’far and Muĥammad ibn ‘Ali Al-Jawād (a.s.) in Baghdad

parts.text: أَحْمَدَ بْنِ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ الْبَرْقِيِّ

text: قُلْتُ لِلرِّضَا (ع) مَا لِمَنْ زَارَ قَبْرَ أَبِيكَ أَبِي الْحَسَنِ (ع) فَقَالَ زُرْهُ قَالَ فَقُلْتُ فَأَيُّ شَيْءٍ فِيهِ مِنَ الْفَضْلِ قَالَ لَهُ مِثْلُ مَنْ زَارَ قَبْرَ الْحُسَيْنِ ع

en.sayyid-mohsen-al-husayni-al-milani: 3. ‘Ali ibn Ḥusain narrated to me from Sa’d ibn ‘Abdillāh, from Aḥmad ibn Abī ‘Abdillāh Al-Barqi, from Ḥasan ibn ‘Ali Al-Washā, who said: I asked Imam Riďā (a.s.), “What are the rewards for those who go to the Ziyārah of the grave of your father, Abil Ḥasan (Imam Kāżim (a.s.))?” Imam (a.s.) replied, “Go to his Ziyārah!” I asked, “What are its merits?” Imam (a.s.) replied, “The same as those for going to the Ziyārah of the grave of Ḥusain (a.s.).”
